title: The Dandi March
summary: The Salt March, also known as the Dandi March and the Dandi Satyagraha, was an act of nonviolent civil disobedience in colonial India led by Mahatma Gandhi.
events: 12 March 1930: March begins from Sabarmati Ashram.
6 April 1930: Gandhi breaks the salt laws at Dandi.
Mass civil disobedience follows across India.

title: Quit India Movement
summary: Launched by Mahatma Gandhi at the Bombay session of the All-India Congress Committee demanding an end to British rule in India.
events: 9 August 1942: Mass arrests of Congress leaders.
Widespread protests and parallel governments formed.
